steps.title: Fastest path: graph the equations as written
steps.content:
Type the equations into Desmos exactly as they appear, one per row:
$$y = 5x + 10$$
$$y = 5x - 2$$
You do not need to solve or rearrange them first.

steps.title: Read the number of intersections
steps.content: The graphs show zero intersection points, so the matching answer is A, Zero.

steps.title: Why this works
steps.content: The two equations have the same slope, 5, but different y-intercepts, 10 and -2. Lines with the same slope and different y-intercepts are parallel, so they never intersect.
